'''Joak Quiller''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] on the [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']] as of [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]]. His identification number was '''TKR 2014'''. He later became a member of the [[Hand of Judgment]]. He was part of [[Daric LaRone]]'s "party" escaping the ''Reprisal'' because of being part of [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Drelfin]]'s death.

==Appearances==
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
